metadata.source: Constrained Override Pathway and Preventing Override Accumulation sections, Paper1_Manuscript.docx
metadata.description: Override criteria, safeguards, and provisional defaults for Gates 2-4

operative_criteria.criterion: Documented rationale from the accountable clinical lead

operative_criteria.provisional_note: Proposed as a provisional pilot default requiring empirical calibration rather than a quasi-canonical value

operative_criteria.criterion: Prospective monitoring plan specific to the gap
Board or governance committee approval producing a documented record

accumulation_safeguards.name: Concurrent override limits
accumulation_safeguards.description: A single AI system may not operate under more than one active override simultaneously
accumulation_safeguards.provisional_note: Proposed as a provisional default; institutions may calibrate based on portfolio size and risk tolerance

accumulation_safeguards.name: Institutional override registers
accumulation_safeguards.description: All active overrides maintained in a single, auditable register visible to the governance committee

accumulation_safeguards.name: Escalation triggers
accumulation_safeguards.description: If more than two AI systems are operating under active overrides, or if any single gate generates overrides across more than 30% of deployed systems, the governance committee must convene a structural review
accumulation_safeguards.provisional_note: 30% is a proposed starting point requiring local calibration
